/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No route, no existing alias, no redirect, and no pathauto pattern produces it. Path is free now and not claimed by any module-owned route.

/moderated-content.reason: No route at this literal path (the moderated-content view lives at /admin/content/moderated), no alias, no redirect. Safe; the only pathauto pattern that could ever emit it is /[node:title], which would only fire for the node itself.

/blog.reason: Alias already exists: /blog maps to /page/2, a live canvas_page node titled 'Blog'. Reusing it would collide with that node's alias.

/search.reason: Live route view.search.page is bound to /search (search View, page display, enabled). A node alias of /search would be shadowed by the View route, which wins.

/admin/content/files.reason: The core 'files' View is present but disabled; its page_1 display is path /admin/content/files. Enabling it (routine config change) creates a route here that shadows the alias. Also under the admin/content section namespace.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: The 'scheduler_scheduled_media' View is present but disabled; its overview display is path /admin/content/media/scheduled. Enabling scheduler for the Media entity type (routine config) activates this route and shadows the alias.
